## utm-dev ios logs

Stream iOS simulator logs (Ctrl+C to stop)

### Synopsis

Stream filtered log output from the booted iOS simulator.
Use --all to show all logs instead of just Gio/Go-related ones.

```
utm-dev ios logs [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --all    Show all simulator logs (not just Gio-filtered)
  -h, --help   help for logs
```

* [utm-dev ios](utm-dev_ios.md)	 - iOS simulator management
